arabic: هَلۡ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلۡإِنسَٰنِ حِينٞ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهۡرِ لَمۡ يَكُن شَيۡـٔٗا مَّذۡكُورًا
transliteration: Hal ata AAala alinsani heenun mina alddahri lam yakun shayan mathkooran
translation: There was – was there not? – a time when man [before he was created] was not yet a thing worth mentioning.

arabic: إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مِن نُّطۡفَةٍ أَمۡشَاجٖ نَّبۡتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ سَمِيعَۢا بَصِيرًا
transliteration: Inna khalaqna alinsana min nutfatin amshajin nabtaleehi fajaAAalnahu sameeAAan baseeran
translation: It is, indeed, We who have created man out of a mixed [fertilized] ovum, so that We try him out. And then We made him a being endowed with hearing and sight.

arabic: إِنَّا هَدَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرٗا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
transliteration: Inna hadaynahu alssabeela imma shakiran waimma kafooran
translation: We do indeed guide him, whether he be grateful or ungrateful.

arabic: إِنَّآ أَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ سَلَٰسِلَاْ وَأَغۡلَٰلٗا وَسَعِيرًا
transliteration: Inna aAAtadna lilkafireena salasila waaghlalan wasaAAeeran
translation: For those who suppress the Truth, We have readied chains, and shackles, and a blazing Fire!

arabic: إِنَّ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارَ يَشۡرَبُونَ مِن كَأۡسٖ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
transliteration: Inna alabrara yashraboona min kasin kana mizajuha kafooran
translation: The righteous indeed shall drink from a cup containing a camphor-flavoured beverage.

arabic: عَيۡنٗا يَشۡرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفۡجِيرٗا
transliteration: AAaynan yashrabu biha AAibadu Allahi yufajjiroonaha tafjeeran
translation: A fountain from which Allah's subjects shall drink, making it flow as and when required.
notes: The description of the source of the drink there in Paradise is akin to a modern-day city home water tap from which one can have water as much as one likes by opening and closing the cock. This is another sign of the Qur’aan being divine since it speaks about things which were not commonly prevalent among people to whom it was initially revealed.

arabic: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذۡرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوۡمٗا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسۡتَطِيرٗا
transliteration: Yoofoona bialnnathri wayakhafoona yawman kana sharruhu mustateeran
translation: They fulfill their vows, and fear a Day the evil of which would be widespread,

arabic: وَيُطۡعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسۡكِينٗا وَيَتِيمٗا وَأَسِيرًا
transliteration: WayutAAimona alttaAAama AAala hubbihi miskeenan wayateeman waaseeran
translation: And they feed – for the sheer love of Him – the needy, the orphan, and the victim of circumstances .
notes: The Arabic term aseer (literal meaning ‘captive’), in modern circumstances, could be applied to riot victims and such other persecuted people.

arabic: إِنَّمَا نُطۡعِمُكُمۡ لِوَجۡهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمۡ جَزَآءٗ وَلَا شُكُورًا
transliteration: Innama nutAAimukum liwajhi Allahi la nureedu minkum jazaan wala shukooran
translation: “We feed you only for Allah’s sake: we desire no recompense from you, nor thanks!”

arabic: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوۡمًا عَبُوسٗا قَمۡطَرِيرٗا
transliteration: Inna nakhafu min rabbina yawman AAaboosan qamtareeran
translation: “We do indeed fear from our Lord a distressful, disastrous Day!”

arabic: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمۡ نَضۡرَةٗ وَسُرُورٗا
transliteration: Fawaqahumu Allahu sharra thalika alyawmi walaqqahum nadratan wasurooran
translation: And then, Allah will save them from the woes of that Day and will bestow on them brightness and joy.

arabic: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُواْ جَنَّةٗ وَحَرِيرٗا
transliteration: Wajazahum bima sabaroo jannatan wahareeran
translation: And He will reward them, for their patience, with Garden [Paradise] and silk [garments].

arabic: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَآئِكِۖ لَا يَرَوۡنَ فِيهَا شَمۡسٗا وَلَا زَمۡهَرِيرٗا
transliteration: Muttakieena feeha AAala alaraiki la yarawna feeha shamsan wala zamhareeran
translation: They will be reclining on couches there. They will feel neither sunburn therein nor intense cold.

arabic: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيۡهِمۡ ظِلَٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتۡ قُطُوفُهَا تَذۡلِيلٗا
transliteration: Wadaniyatan AAalayhim thilaluha wathullilat qutoofuha tathleelan
translation: And its shadows will come down low over them, and its clusters of fruit will dangle within reach.

arabic: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٖ مِّن فِضَّةٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖ كَانَتۡ قَوَارِيرَا۠
transliteration: Wayutafu AAalayhim bianiyatin min fiddatin waakwabin kanat qawareera
translation: And silver vessels and glass goblets will be passed around them.

arabic: قَوَارِيرَاْ مِن فِضَّةٖ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقۡدِيرٗا
transliteration: Qawareera min fiddatin qaddarooha taqdeeran
translation: From silver [vessel] to glass [goblet] – [the drink will be poured out] in required quantity.

arabic: وَيُسۡقَوۡنَ فِيهَا كَأۡسٗا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
transliteration: Wayusqawna feeha kasan kana mizajuha zanjabeelan
translation: And in it [Paradise] they will be given to drink of a cup containing a ginger-flavoured beverage.

arabic: عَيۡنٗا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلۡسَبِيلٗا
transliteration: AAaynan feeha tusamma salsabeelan
translation: [The source of the beverage is a fountain] therein named ‘Salsabeel’.

arabic: ۞وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وِلۡدَٰنٞ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيۡتَهُمۡ حَسِبۡتَهُمۡ لُؤۡلُؤٗا مَّنثُورٗا
transliteration: Wayatoofu AAalayhim wildanun mukhalladoona itha raaytahum hasibtahum luluan manthooran
translation: And waiting upon them will be immortal boys. When you see them, you would think they were pearls dispersed.

arabic: وَإِذَا رَأَيۡتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيۡتَ نَعِيمٗا وَمُلۡكٗا كَبِيرًا
transliteration: Waitha raayta thamma raayta naAAeeman wamulkan kabeeran
translation: And when you look, you would be looking at bliss and a realm transcendent!

arabic: عَٰلِيَهُمۡ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضۡرٞ وَإِسۡتَبۡرَقٞۖ وَحُلُّوٓاْ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٖ وَسَقَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ شَرَابٗا طَهُورًا
transliteration: AAaliyahum thiyabu sundusin khudrun waistabraqun wahulloo asawira min fiddatin wasaqahum rabbuhum sharaban tahooran
translation: Upon them will be garments of green silk and brocade; and they will be adorned with silver bracelets. And their Lord will give them a pure drink.

arabic: إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمۡ جَزَآءٗ وَكَانَ سَعۡيُكُم مَّشۡكُورًا
transliteration: Inna hatha kana lakum jazaan wakana saAAyukum mashkooran
translation: “This indeed is a reward for you, and your struggle [in worldly life] is appreciated!”

arabic: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ تَنزِيلٗا
transliteration: Inna nahnu nazzalna AAalayka alqurana tanzeelan
translation: Indeed, We have sent down the Qur’aan on you, in stages !
notes: To learn why, turn to [25:32] in PART I of this Tafsir.

arabic: فَٱصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعۡ مِنۡهُمۡ ءَاثِمًا أَوۡ كَفُورٗا
transliteration: Faisbir lihukmi rabbika wala tutiAA minhum athiman aw kafooran
translation: Await, then, your Lord's decree, and obey not any sinner or ingrate among them!

arabic: وَٱذۡكُرِ ٱسۡمَ رَبِّكَ بُكۡرَةٗ وَأَصِيلٗا
transliteration: Waothkuri isma rabbika bukratan waaseelan
translation: And do chant your Lord's name morning and evening

arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَٱسۡجُدۡ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحۡهُ لَيۡلٗا طَوِيلًا
transliteration: Wamina allayli faosjud lahu wasabbihhu laylan taweelan
translation: And during the night. And then prostrate before Him. And extol His glory during the long night.

arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلۡعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمۡ يَوۡمٗا ثَقِيلٗا
transliteration: Inna haolai yuhibboona alAAajilata wayatharoona waraahum yawman thaqeelan
translation: These [who suppress the Truth] do indeed love this transitory life, and leave a hard and difficult Day behind their backs.

arabic: نَّحۡنُ خَلَقۡنَٰهُمۡ وَشَدَدۡنَآ أَسۡرَهُمۡۖ وَإِذَا شِئۡنَا بَدَّلۡنَآ أَمۡثَٰلَهُمۡ تَبۡدِيلًا
transliteration: Nahnu khalaqnahum washadadna asrahum waitha shina baddalna amthalahum tabdeelan
translation: It is We who have created them and given them their strength. And when we so will, We can replace them with others of their kind.

arabic: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذۡكِرَةٞۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلٗا
transliteration: Inna hathihi tathkiratun faman shaa ittakhatha ila rabbihi sabeelan
translation: This [Qur’aan] indeed is a Counsel. He then, who so wills, may take a way to his Lord.

arabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمٗا
transliteration: Wama tashaoona illa an yashaa Allahu inna Allaha kana AAaleeman hakeeman
translation: But you cannot will it unless Allah so wills! Allah is indeed Aware, Wise.

arabic: يُدۡخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِي رَحۡمَتِهِۦۚ وَٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ عَذَابًا أَلِيمَۢا
transliteration: Yudkhilu man yashao fee rahmatihi waalththalimeena aAAadda lahum AAathaban aleeman
translation: HE admits to His grace whom He wills. And He has readied painful punishment for the wicked people.
